item.description:
# SuperScreenshot 0.9.77
- 新增内置“检查更新”功能，并支持每日自动检查。 - 使用 Sparkle EdDSA 签名验证更新包。 - 新增多语言“关于”窗口及反馈、GitHub、许可证入口。 - 修复 SuperScreenshot 自身窗口无法自动识别和截取的问题。 - 统一产品、文档、仓库链接及安装包命名。
---
- Added built-in update checks with daily automatic checking. - Secured update archives with Sparkle EdDSA signatures. - Added a localized About window with feedback, GitHub, and license links. - Fixed automatic detection and capture of SuperScreenshot's own windows. - Unified product, documentation, repository, and package naming.
